consistent.item: Studio route and server guard alignment
Bookmarks page and bookmarks API authentication

mismatches.item: Unpublished comments, reactions, helpfulness, and stats remain AUTHOR-only in backend services
Frontend bookmark button still overfetches /bookmarks instead of using /articles/:articleId/bookmark-status
Public article page has no authenticated draft preview flow despite backend unpublished detail support

finding.title: Unpublished auxiliary endpoints are not aligned with studio access helpers
finding.behavior: These services gate unpublished access with AUTHOR-own checks instead of AUTHOR or EDITOR plus canManageArticle().
finding.recommendation: Use shared studio access helpers for unpublished article access on these services.

finding.title: Bookmark button does not consume the new bookmark-status endpoint
finding.behavior: The frontend still loads the full bookmarks list to derive one article's bookmark state.
finding.recommendation: Switch the frontend per-article bookmark lookup to GET /articles/:articleId/bookmark-status.

finding.title: Public article page is published-oriented while backend supports authenticated unpublished detail
finding.behavior: The backend can return unpublished detail for authorized users, but the current frontend page only performs anonymous-style public fetches.
finding.recommendation: Add a dedicated authenticated draft preview flow only if required; keep the public page published-only.
